query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Earth Structure and Processes', 'Learn about Earth layers, plate tectonics, weathering, and erosion.', 'https://example.com/video/earth', 'Earth Guide', 'Analyze geological features', 14), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Space and Astronomy', 'Explore solar system, stars, galaxies, and universe.', 'https://example.com/video/space', 'Astronomy Reference', 'Analyze astronomical phenomena', 15), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Data Interpretation in Science', 'Develop skills for reading and interpreting scientific data and graphs.', 'https://example.com/video/data-sci', 'Data Interpretation Guide', 'Analyze scientific data', 16), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Science Test-Taking Strategies', 'Learn strategies for approaching science questions on GED test.', 'https://example.com/video/sci-strategies', 'Science Strategies Guide', 'Practice timed questions', 17), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Science Practice and Review', 'Comprehensive review of all science topics with practice questions.', 'https://example.com/video/sci-review', 'Science Review Guide', 'Complete science practice test', 18);
